name: Claude Code
overview: Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic CLI tool that helps developers write, debug, and test code. This roadmap covers mastering the Claude ecosystem and the specific techniques required to get the most out of Claude 3.5 Sonnet and beyond.
prerequisites: Knowledge of an existing programming language

intermediate: Using MCP servers for local context
Refactoring legacy code with agentic loops
advanced: Benchmarking AI performance on custom tasks

projects.title: Unit Test Bot
projects.description: Use Claude Code to automatically explore a repository and generate comprehensive unit tests for all utility functions.

projects.title: MCP Hub Connector
projects.description: Develop and integrate a custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects Claude Code to a third-party API for data-driven decisions.

projects.title: Auto-Refactor Agent
projects.description: Build an agentic pipeline using Claude Code and MCP to identify legacy patterns across a large codebase and safely migrate them to modern standards.

bestPractices: Use the /compact command to save tokens
Write specific instructions for complex tasks
Integrate with MCP for live data
